name: organize-folder
description: Sort a messy folder via a reviewable manifest.

tools.name: organize_folder
tools.description: Scan a folder, build a reviewable manifest, apply approved moves, and undo moves.

tools.name: scan_folder
tools.description: Scan a folder with existing safeguards and produce run artifacts.

tools.name: generate_manifest
tools.description: Create or refresh a reviewable organization manifest and plan report.

tools.name: apply_manifest
tools.description: Apply a validated organization manifest using integrity checks and move logging.

tools.name: hash_files
tools.description: Compute full SHA-256 hashes and organize-folder fingerprints for files.
